## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content production, performance, and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [6 articles staged last week, 7 in progress this week; additional topics being added to queue](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Octave integration moving forward; Victor to provide API key and platform access](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [Performance holding steady; slight dips in some areas, increases in conversion events](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Integration pages not receiving much LLM traffic; team to investigate optimization strategies](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Refreshes and image generation to be prioritized in upcoming content production](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [6 articles staged last week (one existing content, didn't need creation)](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [7 articles in progress this week from approved list](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [Additional opportunities being added to Airtable queue](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Two-week rolling basis for topic planning](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)

### Octave Integration

  - [Victor to provide API key and add GrowthX team to Octave platform](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Engineering team starting to game out integration](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Team to review Octave content to ensure alignment with artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)

### Performance Report

  - [Overall traffic steady; slight dip in referrer traffic](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [Non-branded impressions fell slightly in integration and use case clusters](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Conversion events saw a jump: 34% increase in "Talk to sales" CTA](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Headless CMS content showing volatility in performance](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [GSC data shows 48% average position drop to 10.2; investigating causes](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [LLM referrals declined slightly from previous high](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)

### Integration Pages and LLM Traffic

  - [Integration pages getting fair traffic in HubSpot campaign](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [Team to investigate optimizing integration pages for LLM discoverability](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [Strategies include focusing on referrals/mentions, combining pain points/use cases](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [Potential adjustments: formatting, chunking information, adding overview sections](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)

### Content Feedback and Improvements

  - [Theodore noted issues with code formatting (backticks, syntax highlighting)](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
  - [Team to follow up on specific examples and potential workflow updates](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1138.0)

### Visual Content Generation

  - [Discussion on generating image illustrations for articles](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)
  - [Team to prioritize implementing this in the workflow](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)
  - [Possibility of leveraging GrowthX design center for specific image requests](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)

### Content Refreshes

  - [Prioritizing refreshes based on traffic loss and outdated information](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
  - [Process involves running topics by Theo for approval](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [Victor emphasized importance of speed and not waiting for original authors](https://fathom.video/share/ozAo-pihmzgdPR1Gbo4Kx3nhyQgzafjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)
